onboarding.subtitle: AI Product Images — 3 Steps to Start
onboarding.step1Desc: Drag or click to upload product photos, supports JPG / PNG / WebP, up to 20MB each
onboarding.step1Tip: Clear front-facing product photos work best
onboarding.step2Desc: Select target platform and scene mode. AI auto-matches platform image specs and generates compliant product images
onboarding.step2Tip: 14 major e-commerce platforms supported, auto-adapts size and background
onboarding.step3Desc: Generated images can be published directly to Shopify / TikTok Shop, or downloaded locally for manual upload
onboarding.step3Tip: Publishable platforms auto-sync, others one-click download

hero.headline: Product photos done in a flash.
hero.subheadline: Upload a product photo, pick a style, get platform-ready images in seconds. Works across 14 marketplaces.
hero.ctaSub: 10 free credits monthly. No credit card.

trustCloud.title: 14 marketplaces. One button.
trustCloud.subtitle: Every image auto-matched to each platform's size, background, and margin rules.

styleShowcase.title: Four styles. One click.
styleShowcase.subtitle: Pick a look. The engine handles the rest.

tooltips.cosmetics: Soft light and shadow — great for beauty and skincare.
tooltips.luxury: High-end gloss — instantly lifts premium feel.
tooltips.cyber: Bold neons — ideal for tech, gaming, and streetwear.

workflow.title: Three steps to pro photos
workflow.subtitle: From raw shot to finished assets in under three minutes

step1.title: Upload
step1.desc: Drop your product photo. PNG, JPG, WebP — up to 20MB each.

step2.title: Pick a style
step2.desc: Choose a look and your target platform. The engine handles sizing and background specs.

step3.title: Download or publish
step3.desc: Grab the full set as a .zip, or publish directly to Shopify or TikTok Shop.

roi.title: What a single SKU actually costs
roi.subtitle: Based on 5 main images per listing
roi.winner: Flashant saves you about the cost of a coffee per SKU.

bottomCta.title: Swap the phone snap. Ship this instead.
bottomCta.subtitle: Free to start. 10 credits a month. No card needed.

integrations.helpTiktokGuideDesc: Learn how to list products and manage orders

SHOPIFY.background: Solid background, white or light gray recommended
notes: Compress to under 300 KB for faster loading
Keep all images 1:1 ratio for consistent layout

TIKTOK_SHOP.background: Pure white background (RGB 255, 255, 255) for main image
notes: Product must fill 60%+ of image space
No watermarks, text, logos, borders, or collages
Upload 5-9 multi-angle images recommended
No obvious AI-generated traces allowed
Main image must be pure white background, product fills 85%+
No watermarks, text, logos, or promotions
Secondary images can be lifestyle or detail shots

EBAY.background: White or light background, lifestyle images allowed
notes: Most lenient platform rules
Lifestyle images can be used as main image
Up to 12 images per listing

WALMART.background: Pure white background required, no reflections
notes: Main image: no models (except apparel)
Images pass through AI auto-moderation
Apparel can use 3:4 portrait orientation
Etsy buyers prefer lifestyle/scene images
Handcrafted items: show texture details
Avoid overly commercial styling
Main image: pure white background, no shadows
Product must fill 65%+ of image space
No watermarks, logos, or text
Product must fill 80%+ of image space
No borders, watermarks, reflections, or text
Apparel can use 2:3 portrait orientation
Product must fill 70%+ of image space
No collages, watermarks, or excessive text
Largest e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia

TAOBAO.name: Taobao
TAOBAO.background: Pure white background, no watermarks or logos
notes: Requires 1:1 + 3:4 + white BG + SKU images
File size limit raised to 20MB
2025 quality detection: low-quality images blocked

TMALL.name: Tmall
TMALL.background: Pure white background, no watermarks or logos
notes: Must provide 800x800 PNG transparent product image
Main image must be real photo, no renders
Higher quality bar than Taobao, brand-focused

JD.name: JD
JD.background: Clean white background, no large text overlays
notes: Up to 6 main images
First main image must be clean white background
Main image video: 1:1 (1080x1080), ≤30s recommended

PINDUODUO.name: Pinduoduo
PINDUODUO.background: Mostly white background, moderate lifestyle allowed
notes: Product must fill ≥80% of frame
Main image text ≤20% to avoid spam flagging
Moderate promo text allowed but must not cover product

DOUYIN.name: Douyin Shop
DOUYIN.background: Pure white background or clean lifestyle scene
notes: First image must be real product photo, no renders
Text must cover ≤10% of image
Multiple angles required, no duplicate angles
Can upload 3:4 portrait main image (750x1000)
